features: ICONIC AFRICA FRAGRANCE - Experience the legendary and masculine scent of Lynx Africa, featuring a bold fusion of fresh mandarin and warm sandalwood notes. This iconic deodorant body spray provides long-lasting freshness, confidence, and energy throughout the day. Loved by men for over two decades, it keeps you smelling great, feeling fresh, and ready for any occasion, from work to workouts.

48H ODOUR PROTECTION - Stay fresh and confident for up to 48 hours with Lynx Africa’s advanced odour protection formula. Designed with powerful antibacterial agents and Zinc technology, it eliminates body odour at its source while keeping your skin cool and dry. This long-lasting deodorant spray ensures unbeatable freshness even during intense activities or hot weather. Enjoy the freedom to move without worry. Lynx Africa keeps you protected, energised, and feeling your best all day, every day.

ZINC TECHNOLOGY - Lynx Africa features innovative Zinc technology that works deep to neutralise odour-causing bacteria, not just cover it. This high-performance formula provides continuous freshness while being gentle on your skin, reducing irritation or residue. Perfect for daily use, it delivers reliable protection with a crisp, masculine fragrance. The fast-drying spray ensures no stickiness or white marks, just clean, smooth, and confident protection for modern men who value performance and comfort.

EFFECTIVE APPLICATION - Enjoy effortless freshness with the Lynx Africa aerosol body spray. The easy-spray design allows quick, even coverage across your chest and underarms, ensuring instant dryness and comfort. Its lightweight formula absorbs fast without leaving wetness, making it perfect for mornings, gym sessions, or travel. Dermatologically tested and suitable for all skin types, this deodorant spray provides consistent freshness and convenience.

GREAT VALUE 6-PACK - Get unbeatable value with this Lynx Africa 6 Pack (200ml each), ideal for everyday freshness or stocking up your favourite scent. Keep one at home, one in your gym bag, and one at work, ensuring you’re always ready to refresh on the go. Each spray delivers the iconic fragrance and protection you trust, with long-lasting performance. Lynx Africa’s 6-pack set combines quality, convenience, and value for modern men who want to smell great all day.
description: Product Description About Lynx For over 30 years, Lynx has served knockout fragrances and today over 8 million guys across the UK & Ireland use Lynx products every day. Lynx, originally launched under the name of Axe, was later introduced to our UK lads in ’85. Kick starting with three separate fragrances: Amber, Musk, and Spice. Absolute classics. But it doesn’t stop there. We’ve gone from fragrances to antiperspirants, stick, roll-on, shower gels, hair products, and more Africa - G.O.A.T of Fragrance Spice up your day with the entire LYNX Africa range. The G.O.A.T of fragrance. Pair your bodyspray with the Africa aftershave or Africa bodywash. Have your great-smelling, cool confidence in every way, shape and form. UK's #1 Male Fragrance 48H High Definition Fragrance Mandarin and Sandalwood Scent You are holding true greatness. LYNX's Africa is the UK's #1 fragrance* – you don't want to be the one missing out! We've sold +400 million LYNX Africa Bad Boys and then some. That is one for every person in the UK & Ireland five times over. Embrace the G.O.A.T. sensation of this LYNX bodyspray deodorant with its uniquely warm fragrance. This bodyspray has the iconic LYNX Africa deodorant fragrance with a fresh new look. The G.O.A.T. Have your great-smelling, cool confidence in every way, shape and form. LYNX Africa Bodyspray gives you 48 hours of odour protection with our revolutionary dual-action odour-busting zinc technology, keeping you smelling awesome and feeling chill, all day. No matter what comes your way, LYNX Africa Bodyspray has got you covered with the warm fragrance of squeezed mandarin and sandalwood LYNX deodorants come in metal cans that can be reused infinitely. When properly processed, this cans can have a second life, and then another one. It's the right choice for a cleaner planet.
